# Vendor Notice: reference-agent

This directory vendors code from the upstream `knowledge-catalog/okf/src/reference_agent` project.

- Upstream repository: `https://github.com/bluewms/knowledge-catalog`
- Upstream branch: `zh`
- Upstream commit: `b4a3d8c`
- Snapshot date: `2026-06-24`
- Original license: Apache License 2.0 (`knowledge-catalog/LICENSE.md`)

## Scope of vendored files

- Python source under `reference_agent/`
- Prompt assets under `reference_agent/prompts/`
- Viewer assets under `reference_agent/viewer/`

## Maintenance policy

- Keep this vendor copy functionally aligned with upstream behavior.
- Use `scripts/sync_vendor_from_upstream.sh` (to be added) for sync updates.
- Do not change upstream context-length behavior unless explicitly requested.
